overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character ascending the grand marble staircase of the Serapeion temple, exploring the summit platform with panoramic views of ancient Alexandria and distant mountains, and entering the colonnaded temple interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial staircase of the Serapeion temple

events.description: sun becomes visible over the left railing, creating lens flare and brightening the scene

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase toward the temple entrance at the summit

entered.detail: wide ceremonial stairs with geometric patterned edges
decorative carved stone balustrades with relief patterns
decorative carved stone balustrades with relief patterns
classical Greco-Roman temple front with columns and statues on the roofline
tall narrow evergreen trees flanking the staircase
tall narrow evergreen trees flanking the staircase
large ornate stone pots with palm plants

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand marble staircase flanked by decorative railings and cypress trees. The morning sun creates lens flare as the camera climbs toward the classical temple facade visible at the summit, with ornate planters and carved stonework visible along the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple summit platform with panoramic city views

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the open summit platform
character turns to the right to look out over the city panorama and distant sea

agents.ego_description: walking along the temple platform edge observing the cityscape, distant mountains, and coastline

notable_agents.action: civilian in white robes walking across the platform toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: flat marble terrace at the top of the stairs
ancient city with terracotta rooftops, streets, and buildings stretching to the horizon
large mountain range visible in the distance beyond the city
body of water with ships and coastline visible on the horizon
fire pits with smoke rising from the platform edge
tall tower structure visible in the distant city

segments.scene_description: Having reached the summit, the character explores the open platform with panoramic views of the ancient city, distant mountains, and sea. A civilian walks across the platform as the character turns to admire the vista, with stone braziers smoking gently at the platform edges and the lighthouse visible in the far distance.

events.description: character turns away from the city view and approaches the temple entrance colonnade
entering the shadow of the temple colonnade, lighting becomes diffused and cooler

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the temple colonnade, passing other pedestrians on the stairs

notable_agents.action: civilian descending the stairs from the temple entrance

entered.detail: covered porch with tall fluted stone columns
fluted columns with red and gold painted bases
fluted columns with red and gold painted bases
decorated ceiling with square recessed panels
open courtyard visible through the colonnade with a large central tree
mature tree growing in the temple courtyard beyond the columns

segments.scene_description: The character turns from the panoramic view and approaches the temple entrance, entering the colonnaded porch with its tall fluted columns and decorated ceiling. Passing a descending civilian, the character moves into the sheltered space where the lighting becomes diffused, approaching the inner courtyard with its large central tree visible beyond the columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched ascent up a grand staircase to the sheltered, colonnaded interior of a classical temple. It begins by climbing a marble staircase flanked by cypress trees and decorative railings, with the morning sun creating lens flares as the temple facade looms at the summit. Upon reaching the top, the scene expands into an open platform where the camera pans across panoramic vistas of ancient Alexandria, distant mountains, and the far-off lighthouse. The perspective then shifts away from the smoking braziers and city views toward the temple entrance, moving through a porch of tall fluted columns. Finally, the lighting transitions from bright daylight to a diffused glow as the camera enters the sheltered space, approaching an inner courtyard with a large central tree.
